handoff.reason: Plan authored; ORCHESTRATOR dispatch -007 says 'commission and ship'; no pre-req blockers; immediate execution.

hard_constraints: Local-only Ollama embeddings - no cloud LLM providers (per /feedback_coderef_core_rag_local)
Always-on lifecycle: server.js entrypoint, graceful shutdown, no per-request spawn
Reuse existing CORE RAG layer (SemanticSearchService + OllamaProvider + SQLiteVectorStore) - do not fork
Backward-compatible with existing CORE callers (CLI bins keep working)
v1 is localhost-only (no auth, no TLS, no streaming)
503 with {degraded:true, reason} on Ollama unreachable - server does NOT crash

decisions_log.reason: ORCHESTRATOR DISPATCH-2026-04-25-007 explicitly specifies a substantial multi-phase server build (7 deliverables across HTTP scaffolding, 4 endpoints, RAG integration, degraded-path handling, contract docs, fast-start integration, contract tests). Phased plan is the correct shape; light would not capture the gate boundaries.

communication_log.note: Plan authored from DISPATCH-2026-04-25-007. 7 phases (SCAFFOLD/HEALTH+STATUS/QUERY+INDEX/DEGRADED-PATH/CONTRACT-DOCS/FAST-START+DEPLOY/CLOSE). Phase 7 hard stop. Foundation-docs gate TRUE. Supersedes DISPATCH-005 (same WO). No blockers; immediate execution.
Universal Phase 6 close-gate fired (5 generators + enhancer + validator all exit 0). foundation-docs regenerated against fresh .coderef/index.json (re-scanned just before gate).

New surface (coderef-rag-server CLI + 4 endpoints) is documented in 3 dedicated docs already (rag-http-api.md, DEPLOY-CODEREF-RAG-SERVER.md, CLI.md row). No SKILLS/CORE wrapper for coderef-rag-server authored — same deferred-sweep policy as chokidar wrapper.

All 7 phases shipped. SCAFFOLD (3430f1d), HEALTH+STATUS (a379b38), QUERY+INDEX+DEGRADED (5519f44 - phases 3+4 batched), CONTRACT-DOCS (a6c6eb8), DEPLOYMENT STORY (f2d6081). Phase 6 universal gate fired and passed (validator_exit=0). 2 contract tests pass (health + status; query/index degraded path). Pre-existing TS errors in src/context/, src/plugins/ unrelated. Server contract: GET /api/health, GET /api/rag/status (always 200, even Ollama-down), POST /api/rag/query (503 envelope when Ollama down), POST /api/rag/index (subprocess + per-project mutex). 8-9 files added/modified. Tracking validator: my entries schema-clean; pre-existing FAILs in workorders.json/sessions.json/skills.json unrelated.
